rationale: Ground truth is thin (mostly non-technical: blurred-image question, LGTM approval, a success screenshot) plus one substantive inline comment asking whether test coverage adequately verifies both device_communicator and reduce_scatter fixes. X never engages with that nuance and delivers a shallow PASS/PASS/PASS blocker table plus one vague non-actionable nit. Y produces five concrete, file/line-anchored findings with specific suggested edits (dtype fix, missing test case, docstring, stale comment), cross-referencing upstream vLLM source to ground its claims, and its FakeGroup validation notes brush closer to the reviewer's actual test-coverage concern.
